news.t: YieldMax® ETFs Announces Distributions on MSST, NVIT, and TEST
YieldMax® Launches New Fund Family Focused on Growth + Income: Performance and Distribution Target 25™ ETFs

holdings.infoBox: MSST is an equity ETF with a total of 14 individual holdings. The top holdings are OTHER ASSETS AND LIABILITIES stock at 59.02%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 25.66%, MSTR US 06/18/26 C180 at 23.14%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 10.87%, and MSTR US 05/15/26 C170 at 7.02%.

overview.description: The YieldMax MSTR Performance & Distribution Target 25 ETF (MSST) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund targets an annual 25% distribution level through a combination of synthetic long exposure to MicroStrategy Incorporated (NASDAQ: MSTR) stock and options strategies to generate premiums. MSST was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by YieldMax.
